input.command:
cd /app; readelf -S vulnerable | grep -E '\.data|\.rodata'; echo ---; python3 - <<'EOF'
data=open('vulnerable','rb').read()
# find section offsets via readelf
import subprocess
EOF
objdump -s -j .data vulnerable

cd /app; python3 - <<'EOF'
enc=bytes.fromhex("040e0305 39207624 2471301d 72347130 242e7235 1d2f7631 3671301d 29713b1d 70727076 3f42".replace(" ",""))
out=bytearray()
for b in enc:
    if b==0x42: break
    out.append(b^0x42)
flag=out.decode()
print(flag)
open("/app/results.txt","w").write(flag+"\n")
EOF
echo ---; cat /app/results.txt

content.text:
Extracted. Secret was `.data`@0x404060, each byte XOR 0x42, 0x42-terminated (anti-debug ptrace guarded the runtime path; static decode bypasses it).

`FLAG{b4ff3r_0v3rfl0w_m4st3r_k3y_2024}` → written to `/app/results.txt`.
